name: Weather card

en.when_to_use: Use it to show one location's current weather and next-few-days trend compactly in an answer, such as for trip summaries, event reminders, and daily overviews. To compare several cities, inspect hourly rain, or explore a map, use a table, time-series chart, or weather map instead. This component does not fetch live data.
en.why_valuable: Weather data combines current values, units, and short-term trends, which are hard to scan as plain key-value text. This template makes current temperature and conditions the main visual, keeps humidity, wind, feels-like, and UV as supporting facts, and uses a horizontally scrollable forecast strip for highs, lows, and rain probability.

data_in.note: data must contain weather values already fetched upstream; the component does not connect to the network or infer units. temperature, feelsLike, and forecast.high/low display as Celsius values and automatically add a degree symbol; humidity/rainChance automatically add %. wind should include the required unit. icon uses short emoji/text.

schema.location?: string -- location name; displays "Current weather" when omitted
schema.updated?: string -- data-update time or relative-time text
schema.forecast?: {day:string,icon?:string,high:number|string,low:number|string,rainChance?:number|string}[] -- displays at most the first 7 days

spec.note: Current conditions and up to 7 forecast days grow naturally with content. On narrow screens the current section stacks, and the forecast strip scrolls horizontally within its own area. It uses no vh or percentage heights.

when_to_use: 需要在回答中紧凑展示一个地点的当前天气和未来几天趋势时用它，适合行程摘要、活动提醒和日常概览。若要比较多城市、看小时级降雨或探索地图，应改用表格、时间序列图或天气地图；本组件不负责获取实时数据。
why_valuable: 天气数据包含当前值、单位和短期趋势，纯键值文本不易扫读；本模板把当前温度与状态做成主视觉，湿度、风、体感和 UV 作为辅助事实，再用可横向滚动的预报带呈现高低温与降雨概率。

data_in.note: data 必须由上游提供已获取的天气值；组件不联网、不推断单位。temperature、feelsLike、forecast.high/low 按摄氏度数值显示并自动加 °，humidity/rainChance 自动加 %；wind 应包含所需单位。icon 使用短 emoji/文本。

schema.location?: string —— 地点名称；省略时显示 “Current weather”
schema.updated?: string —— 数据更新时间或相对时间文本

spec.note: 当前条件与最多 7 天预报随内容自动增高；窄屏当前区堆叠，预报带在自身区域横向滚动，无 vh/百分比高度。

example._why: 墨尔本的可识别天气卡包含更新时间、四个当前事实和五日预报，能验证单位、温度层级、天气图标、降雨概率与窄屏预报滚动。

uplink: none: 纯展示组件；所有悬停、滚动、原生链接或其他局部交互都只发生在自有 shadow 内，不向 AI 或宿主回传数据。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
